nasb.text: But instead he will honor a god of fortresses, a god whom his fathers did not know; he will honor him with gold, silver, costly stones and treasures.

esv.text: He shall honor the god of fortresses instead of these. A god whom his fathers did not know he shall honor with gold and silver, with precious stones and costly gifts.

cnv.text: 他倒要敬拜堡壘的神，用金銀寶石和各樣珍寶去敬拜他列祖所不認識的神。

ccb.text: 他反倒祭拜他祖先不认识的堡垒之神，向它献上金银宝石及贵重的礼物。
